events.text: You are born in a busy Nairobi hospital. Your family gathers around, ululating with joy as you take your first breath.

choices.label: Cry loudly
choices.resultText: You announced your arrival with a strong cry. The nurses smiled — a healthy baby.

choices.label: Stay quiet
choices.resultText: You observed the room quietly. Mama said you were a thoughtful child from day one.

events.text: You are born at the local hospital. Your family gathers around, celebrating as you take your first breath.

choices.label: Cry loudly
choices.resultText: You announced your arrival with a strong cry. The nurses smiled — a healthy baby.

choices.label: Stay quiet
choices.resultText: You observed the room quietly. Your family said you were thoughtful from day one.

events.text: At home in the yard, you wobble on unsteady legs while the dog barks. Your parent cheers you on.

choices.label: Run to Mama
choices.resultText: You stumbled into Mama's arms. The whole family clapped.

choices.label: Chase the chickens
choices.resultText: The chickens fled. You laughed until you fell over.

events.text: You said your first word at the dinner table. Everyone leaned in to listen.

choices.label: Say "Mama"
choices.resultText: Mama's eyes welled up. She pulled you into a tight hug.

choices.label: Say "Cookie"
choices.resultText: The table erupted in laughter. Food was always on your mind.

events.text: Your first day at nursery school. You clutch a new school bag while a {transportMode} rumbles past on the road outside.

choices.label: Wave goodbye bravely
choices.resultText: You marched into class like a big kid. The teacher was impressed.

choices.label: Cry and hold Mama's leg
choices.resultText: Mama stayed a few extra minutes. You settled in eventually.

choices.label: Make friends immediately
choices.resultText: You shared your biscuits with a classmate. A friendship was born.

events.text: You ride a matatu to primary school for the first time. Loud music blares and the conductor shouts seat prices.

choices.label: Sing along to the music
choices.resultText: You bobbed your head to the beat. Commuters grinned at you.

choices.label: Count the fare carefully
choices.resultText: You handed the conductor exact change. He gave you a thumbs up.

events.text: You ride a {transportMode} to primary school for the first time. Loud music blares and the driver waves you aboard.

choices.label: Sing along with classmates
choices.resultText: You joined a silly song. Everyone laughed.

choices.label: Watch the route carefully
choices.resultText: You memorized every stop. Useful knowledge.

events.text: A classmate shares their lunch with you when you forget yours at home.

choices.label: Share yours tomorrow
choices.resultText: You became lunch buddies. A friendship grew over shared meals.

choices.label: Thank them shyly
choices.resultText: They smiled and said it was nothing. You felt grateful.

events.text: Your sibling takes the remote and won't let you watch your favourite cartoon.

choices.label: Fight for the remote
choices.resultText: Mama separated you both. Nobody won the argument.

choices.label: Negotiate a time share
choices.resultText: You worked out a schedule. Surprisingly mature.

choices.label: Tell Mama
choices.resultText: Mama ruled in your favour. Your sibling stuck out their tongue.

events.text: You wake up with a fever and a sore throat. Mama takes you to the local clinic.

choices.label: Take the medicine
choices.resultText: The bitter syrup worked. You were back on your feet in two days.

choices.label: Refuse the medicine
choices.resultText: The fever lingered longer. You regretted being stubborn.

events.text: Your first baby tooth falls out while eating githeri at lunch.

choices.label: Put it under your pillow
choices.resultText: Your parent left a small coin. The tooth fairy visited Kenya.

choices.label: Show everyone at school
choices.resultText: Classmates were fascinated. You felt like a celebrity for a day.

events.text: Your first baby tooth falls out during lunch at school.

choices.label: Put it under your pillow
choices.resultText: Your parent left a small gift. The tooth fairy paid a visit.

choices.label: Show everyone at school
choices.resultText: Classmates were fascinated. You felt like a celebrity for a day.

events.text: Your parents give you a basic smartphone for keeping in touch after school.

choices.label: Use it responsibly
choices.resultText: You called Mama after practice and did homework on it. Sensible.

choices.label: Stay up late on social media
choices.resultText: You discovered memes at 2 AM. Teachers noticed you yawning.

choices.label: Sell {moneyApp} credit to classmates
choices.resultText: You ran a small phone-credit business. Entrepreneurial spirit.

events.text: Your {secondaryExam} results arrive with your high school admission letter. The name of the school is printed in bold on the envelope.

choices.label: Celebrate with family
choices.resultText: Cake and soda at home. Relatives called to congratulate you.

choices.label: Worry about fees
choices.resultText: Baba reassured you they'd find a way. You started thinking seriously about the future.

events.text: After school, you join a dusty football game in the neighbourhood field.

choices.label: Play striker
choices.resultText: You scored a goal between two stones serving as goalposts. Hero of the day.

choices.label: Sit and watch
choices.resultText: You cheered from the sidelines. Maybe next time.

events.text: Sunday morning. The family dresses up for church. You can smell mandazi frying next door.

choices.label: Sing in the choir
choices.resultText: Your voice joined the hymns. Mama beamed with pride.

choices.label: Doze off during sermon
choices.resultText: The pastor's voice became a lullaby. Your parent nudged you awake.

choices.label: Help serve tea after service
choices.resultText: You carried cups for the elders. They blessed you.

events.text: Sunday morning. The family dresses up for a community service. You can smell fresh pastries from the kitchen.

choices.label: Sing in the choir
choices.resultText: Your voice joined the hymns. Your family beamed with pride.

choices.label: Doze off during the sermon
choices.resultText: The speaker's voice became a lullaby. Someone nudged you awake.

choices.label: Help serve refreshments after
choices.resultText: You carried cups for the elders. They thanked you warmly.

events.text: Heavy rains flood the path to school. You miss the {transportMode} and your shoes are soaked.

choices.label: Walk through the puddles
choices.resultText: You arrived drenched but laughing. The teacher sent you to dry off.

choices.label: Wait for the rain to ease
choices.resultText: You were late but dry. A practical choice.

events.text: Mama asks you to help fetch water from the tap down the road.

choices.label: Go willingly
choices.resultText: You balanced the jerrycan like a pro. Mama gave you extra ugali.

choices.label: Complain but go
choices.resultText: You grumbled all the way. The chore still got done.

choices.label: Pay your sibling to do it
choices.resultText: A small coin changed hands. Early lessons in outsourcing.

events.text: Your parent asks you to help carry groceries home from the shop.

choices.label: Go willingly
choices.resultText: You carried the bags like a pro. Dinner tasted extra good.

choices.label: Complain but go
choices.resultText: You grumbled all the way. The chore still got done.

choices.label: Pay your sibling to do it
choices.resultText: A small bribe changed hands. Early lessons in delegation.
